note: Mathlib/Topology/Instances/RealVectorSpace.lean:37 (theorem map_real_smul:26) — a continuous additive map between real topological vector spaces is R-linear; generalizes the standard continuous-solution resolution of f(x+y)=f(x)+f(y) (only linear maps) beyond R->R to arbitrary TVS.

Mathlib/Algebra/Star/SelfAdjoint.lean:55 — class IsStarNormal (x : R), x commutes with star x, defined for any star monoid; instantiating R = Matrix n n K with star = conjugate transpose gives exactly the normal-matrix condition A*Aᴴ = Aᴴ*A.

Mathlib/Order/SaddlePoint.lean:46 — formalizes the game-theoretic/minimax saddle point of a two-variable function f (f a y <= f x b for all x,y), a distinct-but-related sense of 'saddle point' from the calculus critical-point/Hessian-indefinite notion that mathworld:SaddlePoint and eom:Saddle_point primarily describe; no calculus-sense saddle-point def found in Mathlib.
